modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help installing Blackboard Transact Workstation on my computer.

full_description_text:  
The user is requesting assistance with the installation of the Blackboard Workstation.  
They are using a Windows operating system.  
The user is not familiar with the installation process and requires guidance.  
This request was submitted through a self-service form.
